top3.sql:
WITH organizer_users AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT u.Id, u.Age
    FROM badges b
    JOIN users u ON b.UserId = u.Id
    WHERE b.Name = 'Organizer'
),
teenagers AS (
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS teen_count
    FROM organizer_users
    WHERE Age BETWEEN 13 AND 19
),
total_organizers AS (
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_count
    FROM organizer_users
)
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN t.total_count = 0 THEN 0.0
        ELSE ROUND(100.0 * teen_count / total_count, 2)
    END AS percentage_teenagers
FROM teenagers,...

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN u.Age BETWEEN 13 AND 19 THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_teenagers
FROM badges b
JOIN users u ON b.UserId = u.Id
WHERE b.Name = 'Organizer';

    SELECT DISTINCT u.Id, u.Age
    FROM badges b
    INNER JOIN users u ON b.UserId = u.Id
    WHERE b.Name = 'Organizer'
),

    FROM organizer_users
    WHERE Age IS NOT NULL AND Age >= 13 AND Age <= 19
),
total_organizers AS (

    FROM organizer_users
)

WITH organizer_users AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT b.UserId
    FROM badges b
    WHERE b.Name = 'Organizer'
)
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN u.Age BETWEEN 13 AND 19 THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_teenagers
FROM organizer_users ou
JOIN users u ON ou.UserId = u.Id;

WITH organizer_users AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT u.Id, u.Age
    FROM badges b
    JOIN users u ON b.UserId = u.Id
    WHERE b.Name = 'Organizer'
),
teenagers AS (
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS teen_count
    FROM organizer_users
    WHERE Age BETWEEN 13 AND 19
),
total_organizers AS (
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_count
    FROM organizer_users
)
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN t.total_count = 0 THEN 0.0
        ELSE ROUND(100.0 * teen_count / total_count, 2)
    END AS percentage_teenagers
